/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX13.3.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/rainshaft.dir/evaporation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rainshaft.dir/explicit_integrator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rainshaft.dir/fixed_substep_integrator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rainshaft.dir/forward_euler_integrator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rainshaft.dir/lookup_linear.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rainshaft.dir/lookup_table.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rainshaft.dir/nudging.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rainshaft.dir/rainshaft_driver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rainshaft.dir/rainshaft_derived_vars.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rainshaft.dir/rainshaft_grid.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rainshaft.dir/rainshaft_ncio.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rainshaft.dir/rainshaft_solution.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rainshaft.dir/rainshaft_state.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rainshaft.dir/rainshaft_sum_process.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rainshaft.dir/rainshaft_tendency.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rainshaft.dir/saturation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rainshaft.dir/sed_cfl_integrator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rainshaft.dir/sedimentation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rainshaft.dir/self_collision.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rainshaft.dir/sequential_split_integrator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rainshaft.dir/sundials_integrator.cpp.o -o rainshaft  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib ../libspaecies/libspaecies.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libnetcdf.19.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libhdf5_hl.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libhdf5.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libsz.dylib /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX13.sdk/usr/lib/libz.tbd /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX13.sdk/usr/lib/libdl.tbd /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX13.sdk/usr/lib/libm.tbd /opt/homebrew/lib/libzstd.dylib /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX13.sdk/usr/lib/libbz2.tbd /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX13.sdk/usr/lib/libcurl.tbd /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX13.sdk/usr/lib/libxml2.tbd /usr/local/lib/libsundials_arkode.5.6.1.dylib
